CustomField.description: Indicates this NEPA process is subject to FAST-41 (42 USC 4370m) One Federal Decision requirements. When true, the OFD target days field (nepa_ofd_target_days__c) must be set and the NEPA_OFD_Variance_Alert scheduled flow will monitor for timeline overruns.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check if this project is covered by FAST-41 (Fixing America's Surface Transportation Act) Title 41 permitting requirements.
CustomField.label: FAST-41 Covered
